name: List of extensions - CloudStream Wiki
snippet: ⭐ Invidious – access YouTube through an Invidious instance and through NewPipe's scraper. When the plugin breaks, try another Invidious instance by using the clone site feature and pasting a URL from uptime.invidious.io. The only plugin in this repo is "Mega".

name: Requests based scraping tutorial - Cloudstream 3 Documentation
snippet: Once you've read and understood the concepts behind scraping take a look at a provider for CloudStream. I added tons of comments to make every aspect of writing CloudStream providers clear.

name: how do you add extensions and repositories? : r/Cloudstream3
snippet: Launch your CS3 app and go to your settings. Go to Extensions -> Add Repository (Bottom-Right). Name the Repository whatever, but I recommend whatever it's named on the site. Go to the CS3 site on your phone / other device and hit, "copy link". Paste the link out so you can type it in the "Repository URL" section.
